title: Assembly for spray device, spray device, medicament delivery device and method
abstract: An assembly (32) for a spray device (26), the assembly (32) comprising a nozzle (50); a cartridge (35) for holding a liquid to be pressurized and pushed through the nozzle (50) to form an aerosol; and a cartridge adapter (38) fixed to the cartridge (35) and arranged to hold the nozzle (50) in position relative to the cartridge (35). A spray device (26) comprising an assembly (32), a medicament delivery device comprising an assembly (32) or a spray device (26), and a method of providing an assembly (32) for a spray device (26), are also provided.
claims: Claims 1. An assembly (32) for a spray device (26), the assembly (32) comprising: - a nozzle (50); - a cartridge (35) for holding a liquid to be pressurized and pushed through the nozzle (50) to form an aerosol; and - a cartridge adapter (38) fixed to the cartridge (35) and arranged to hold the nozzle (50) in position relative to the cartridge (35). 2. The assembly (32) according to claim 1, wherein the nozzle (50) is mounted in the cartridge adapter (38). 3. The assembly (32) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the cartridge adapter (38) is fixed to the cartridge (35) by means of a luer lock (28). 4. The assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the nozzle (50) is a micro nozzle. 5. The assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising a nozzle adapter (70) comprising the nozzle (50), wherein the nozzle adapter (70) is configured to be fit in the cartridge adapter (38). 6. The assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the cartridge adapter (38) is made of a material transparent to sterilization gas. 7. The assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the cartridge adapter (38) is assembled from multiple molded components. 8. The assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the cartridge (35) is filled with liquid. 9. A spray device (26) comprising an assembly (32) according to any of the preceding claims. 10. The spray device (26) according to claim 9, further comprising a dispenser unit (20), wherein the cartridge adapter (38) is arranged to hold the nozzle (50) in position relative to the dispenser unit (20). 11. The spray device (26) according to claim 10, wherein the assembly (32) is detachably connectable to the dispenser unit (20). 12. The spray device (26) according to claim 11, further comprising a cartridge holder (30) connected to the dispenser unit (20), wherein the assembly (32) is detachably connectable to the cartridge holder (30). 13. A medicament delivery device comprising an assembly (32) according to any of claims 1 to 8 or a spray device (26) according to any of claims 9 to 12. 14. A method of providing an assembly (32) for a spray device (26), the method comprising: - mounting a nozzle (50) in a cartridge adapter (38); and - connecting the cartridge adapter (38) to a cartridge (35) by connecting a luer lock (28) of the cartridge adapter (38) to a neck (37) of the cartridge (35). 15. The method according to claim 14, further comprising filling the cartridge (35) with liquid prior to connecting the cartridge adapter (38) to the cartridge (35).
